zh.lifeSummary: 當Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir於1030年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特時，他的父親Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir21歲，母親Armenbourge Vergy28歲。他和Erenburga de Chateau du Loire至少有1個女兒。他去世於1095年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o享年65歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gervais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir was born in 1030, in Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir, was 21 and his mother, Armenbourge Vergy, was 28. He had at least 1 daughter with Erenburga de Chateau du Loire. He died in 1095, in Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir est né en 1030, à Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Armenbourge Vergy, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Erenburga de Chateau du Loire. Il est décédé en 1095, à Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir 1030 in Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir 21 und seine Mutter Armenbourge Vergy 28. Er hatte mit Erenburga de Chateau du Loire mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1095 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir è nato il nel 1030 nel Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Armenbourge Vergy, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Erenburga de Chateau du Loire. ja.lifeSummary: Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loirが1030年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスで生まれた時，父Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loirは21歳，母Armenbourge Vergyは28歳であった。彼はErenburga de Chateau du Loireとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1095年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンで65歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir(이)가 1030년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Armenbourge Vergy(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Erenburga de Chateau du Loire(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

Ele faleceu em 1095, em Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France: сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir родился в 1030 г. в местности сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Armenbourge Vergy, 28. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Erenburga de Chateau du Loire. Он умер в 1095 г. в местности рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir nació en 1030, en Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Armenbourge Vergy, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Erenburga de Chateau du Loire. Murió en 1095, en Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
